source: https://www.goarmy.com/bin/aemservlet/cmtjobs?language=en — the Army's own live careers catalogue (262 published MOSs), which publishes an explicit entry_level_requirement flag per MOS.
method: Joined our catalogue codes against the Army's published list. FAIL CLOSED: a code absent from the Army's own catalogue is treated as NOT entry level rather than assumed available.
